name: Nina Aquila: Legal Eagle, Chapter IV: "Sacred Feathers"
short_description: NINA AQUILA is back for her brightest, boldest, most magical adventure yet!
detailed_description:
Welcome back to court in the world where all anime genres exist at once in NINA AQUILA: LEGAL EAGLE, CHAPTER IV: SACRED FEATHERS, the hotly anticipated follow-up to NINA AQUILA: LEGAL EAGLE, SEASON ONE and next chapter in the NINA AQUILA: LEGAL EAGLE story!

Step into Nina Aquila's shoes once again in a thrilling mix of Visual Novel and Adventure game, and continue the fight for justice in a world where all anime genres exist at once!

  • Play a part in an exciting mystery story told over 6+ hours

  • Investigate crime scenes & interrogate witnesses from a top-down perspective

  • Defend your client in court with evidence & cross-examination

  • Become the Valkyrie! Transform & fight off enemies in scrolling fighting game sections

  • Customise your experience with accessibility; reduce visual intensity, turn off minigame difficulty and more!

  • Sleuth out a plot that celebrates the Magical Girl anime genre

Experience Nina Aquila's greatest adventure yet!

It’s been several months since Nina defended the Rostro Racers in court, and Fledge City residents eagerly anticipate the next season of the home-grown streaming show hit: the magical girl sensation, Valkyrie: Sacred Feathers!

But when an on-set lover’s tiff takes a dark turn, Nina Aquila is tasked with defending Millia Nordin, the lead actress, in a murder case that defies explanation, even by the defendant herself.

North of the city, dissent grows as the Bikers of the Wastes are vanishing without a trace. Seeking answers, a lone rider saddles up for the long journey south, seeking the one man who she knows can help her.

With Millia in custody, tension on the streets of Fledge City rises as each night brings with it unnatural, unexplainable events; disappearances, explosions, tales of monsters sighted in dark alleyways. Set on a journey where present fiction echoes the truth of the past, can Nina find the strength buried within herself to search for answers, and rise as the hero that Fledge City needs?

Lore meets the law for a war-between-worlds, with Fledge City’s courtroom as the fulcrum about which fate will turn!

Feathers will fly, wings unfurl, and light will shine amid the darkness… But before that, there’s gonna be magic, monsters and a whole load of sparkles.

Valkyrie… Transform!

  • Hybrid VN/Graphic Adventure gameplay with 6+ hours of story-driven content

  • Pacing, presentation & tone that celebrates the Magical Girl anime genre

  • Defend your client in court by cross-examining witnesses

  • Investigate crime scenes and search for clues

  • Explore Fledge City's Mode7-style overworld

  • Fight off enemies in 16-bit-style scrolling fighting-game sections

  • Accessibility features, including options to reduce effects for photosensitive users, and an "always-win" option for minigames to facilitate casual play

Now, step into court once again as Nina Aquila, and defend your clients in a world where all anime genres exist at once!
